color_system.palette_rationale: Dark forest green evokes mature, professional landscaping without rustic or earthy cliche. Bright green accent reads as nature + life against the dark primary. Slate-100 ink is softer than pure white — reduces eye strain on dark backgrounds.

typography.heading: Fraunces
typography.rationale: Fraunces is a variable optical-size serif: premium, nature-adjacent, craft-connoting. Plus Jakarta Sans is a clean geometric humanist — readable at any size, modern without feeling tech-startup.
